title: Clandestine Childhood
overview: Juan lives in clandestinity. Just like his mum, his dad and his adored uncle Beto, outside his home he has another name. At school, Juan is known as Ernesto. And he meets María, who only has one name. Based on true events, set in the Argentina of 1979, this film is one about love.

trailers.title: Enfance Clandestine, Bande Annonce, Sortie le 08 Mai 2013
